title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.590 - Such funds to be shown as separate items
text:
137.590.  Such funds to be shown as separate items. — The funds provided for in section 137.585 shall be shown as a separate item on all of the financial, budget and other accounting statements of the township board of directors, and such funds shall be specifically and expressly shown and designated on all such as the special road and bridge fund of such township.
(L. 1945 p. 1497 § 8821)
